emails.subject: RE: Project Questions-Florida
emails.body: RE: Project Questions-Florida Please call Debbie and ask her to fax you a copy of the executed guaranty. Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: Project Questions-Florida
emails.body: Well, that is exactly what I am doing right now. I just got her phone number. To: Carnahan, Kathleen

emails.subject: RE: Project Questions-Florida
emails.body: RE: Project Questions-Florida I am almost speechless. I knew things were bad based on what you said. Incredible. Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: Project Questions-Florida
emails.body: Bart is all in a tizzy again. Ben left Sheila another message saying that Bart was holding things up. Now Bart feels like he is in the dog house again. To: Carnahan, Kathleen

emails.subject: RE: Project Questions-Florida
emails.body: RE: Project Questions-Florida He can't help himself. Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>
